nasb.text: He who withholds grain, the people will curse him, But blessing will be on the head of him who sells it.

esv.text: The people curse him who holds back grain, but a blessing is on the head of him who sells it.

cnv.text: 屯積五穀的，必被人民咒詛； 出售糧食的，福祉必臨到他的頭上。

ccb.text: 囤粮不卖，惹人咒诅； 乐意卖粮，必蒙祝福。

csbs.text: 屯粮不卖的，民将咒骂他； 出售五谷的，祝福将临到他头上。
